hero.title: Work that needs trust.
hero.description: We look for people with maturity, good judgment, strong communication and complete respect for privacy.

rolesIntro.title: Work that needs trust and maturity.
rolesIntro.description: HeartLink is not a volume business. Every team member handles private family information. We value good communication, cultural understanding, mature judgment and privacy.

roles.title: Senior Relationship Manager
roles.details: Mumbai · Hybrid · 8+ years in private client, luxury or advisory services

roles.title: Network Scout
roles.details: Global · Flexible · Strong social intelligence and trusted networks

roles.title: Relationship Advisor
roles.details: India · Consulting · Couple or family guidance experience

roles.title: Private Office Associate
roles.details: Mumbai · Full-time · High-touch operations and strict confidentiality

culture.title: Small team. High standards.
culture.description: We work carefully, privately and without pressure. The goal is a good match, not a fast match.

cards.title: Privacy is serious.
cards.description: Every message, meeting and introduction must protect the client.

cards.title: Warm but honest.
cards.description: Clients should feel respected and clearly guided.

closing.quote: Good people may not always fit an open role, but we are happy to hear from them.
